message: I'm very interested in joining the NASA USLI team. I have experience with CAD design and would love to work on the payload system.
I'd like to be part of the propulsion team for NASA USLI. I've worked with solid motors before and understand thrust curves.
Interested in Spaceport America Cup! I'm experienced with high-power rocketry and have my Level 2 certification.
I would love to work on recovery systems for the Spaceport America team. I have experience with parachute design and deployment.
Count me in for Battle of the Rockets! I can help with design and testing.
